services.name: Company Formation Accounting
services.description: Accounting setup and initial fiscal organization for newly incorporated Romanian SRLs.

services.name: PFA vs SRL Advisory
services.description: Advisory comparing PFA and SRL based on taxes, contributions, activity type and growth plans.

services.name: VAT and Cross-Border VAT Compliance
services.description: VAT registration, VAT returns, VAT recovery, intra-EU VAT, OSS/IOSS and cross-border VAT support.

services.name: Tax Advisory and Fiscal Planning
services.description: Tax regime advisory, legal tax optimization, ongoing fiscal planning, administrator salary versus dividends and correction of fiscal errors.

services.name: ANAF Representation and Tax Declaration Filing
services.description: Preparation and filing of Romanian tax declarations and support in relation with ANAF controls, inspections and clarifications.

services.name: Accounting Outsourcing and Monthly Bookkeeping
services.description: Outsourced accounting, monthly bookkeeping, accounting packages, invoice processing, bank reconciliation and financial reporting for Romanian SMEs.

services.name: Accounting Cleanup and Software Migration
services.description: Cleanup of messy accounting records, migration from Excel to accounting software and cloud accounting workflows.

services.name: Payroll Outsourcing and HR Tax Reporting
services.description: Payroll calculation, employment documents, D112 filing, HR tax reporting, benefits taxation and payroll legislation monitoring.

services.name: Management Reporting and Fractional CFO
services.description: Management reports, KPIs, cash-flow, budgeting, financial projections, bank discussions and part-time CFO support.

services.name: Financial Due Diligence and Business Evaluation
services.description: Financial due diligence, company evaluation support and analysis for buying or selling a small business.

services.name: IT and Software Company Accounting
services.description: Accounting for IT SRLs, software freelancers, micro-agencies, international contracts and recurring revenue models.

services.name: E-commerce and Marketplace Accounting
services.description: Accounting for ecommerce and marketplace businesses, including commissions, returns, inventory and EU VAT issues.

services.name: HoReCa Accounting
services.description: Accounting for restaurants, cafes and HoReCa businesses, including inventory, fiscal receipts, margins and VAT specifics.

services.name: Construction Project Accounting
services.description: Accounting for construction companies and contractors with project-level cost, revenue and margin tracking.

services.name: Medical and Dental Practice Accounting
services.description: Accounting for medical and dental practices, including income, expenses, medical equipment and fiscal treatment.

services.name: International Accounting and Group Reporting
services.description: English-language accounting, reporting to headquarters, Romanian GAAP to IFRS mapping and group reporting support.

services.name: Transfer Pricing Support
services.description: Support for identifying intragroup transactions and preparing Romanian transfer pricing documentation.

services.name: Accounting Provider Change, Review and Forensic Accounting
services.description: Accounting provider transition, second opinion review, accounting and tax health-checks and forensic accounting analysis.
